series_metadata.series_title: Sign Support and Lighting Manufacturer''s Certification
series_metadata.series_description: This includes support information including Contractor''s documentation and material test worksheets. The MATERIAL TEST WORKSHEETS contain the hand written notations, internal lab numbers and test results obtained by ODOT technicians during the physical testing of a sample of a Producer/Supplier''s material.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: on OMM X electronic shared drive project site is no longer utilized by ODOT. ; Paper: paper scanned
